meaning: 库马西[加纳中南部城市]
examples: Poorly educated, he, too, is from Kumasi.
The Accra to Kumasi road renewal project is undertaken by China Railway Engineering Corporation and formally started construction in May 2004.
This January, the first container load of nearly 400 toilets arrived in Kumasi, extending our reach enormously.
Attuqayefio dismissed suggestions that playing at Kumasi Sports Stadium gives Kotoko the edge.
Ziese was booed and jeered by an angry crowd at the Kumasi Stadium after the Black Stars drew 1-1 with Uganda on Sunday.
